name: Toso Company, Limited
summary: Toso Company, Limited develops, manufactures, and markets interior products worldwide. The company's products include decorative and functional curtain tracks, motorized curtain tracks, venetian and roller blinds, roman shades, vertical and pleated blinds, and panel tracks, as well as peripheral parts for motorized products. Toso Company, Limited was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
